item.title: Federal Reserve issues FOMC statement on rate decision
item.description: The Federal Reserve maintained the target range for the federal funds rate at 5-1/4 to 5-1/2 percent.

item.title: Federal Reserve releases employment data report
item.description: Nonfarm payroll employment rose by 275,000 in February.

item.title: Federal Reserve Board announces annual CPI inflation update
item.description: Consumer prices rose 3.2 percent over the past 12 months.
